name: SheetMind: An End-to-End LLM-Powered Multi-Agent Framework for Spreadsheet Automation

description: arXiv:2506.12339v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: We present SheetMind, a modular multi-agent framework powered by large language models (LLMs) for spreadsheet automation via natural language instructions. In this paper, we introduce a hierarchical agentic system consisting of three specialized agents: Manager Agent that decomposes complex user instructions into subtasks; an Action Agen...
author: Xi Cheng, Ruiyan Zhu, Ke Liu, Rakesh Chowdary Machineni, Lyuhao Chen, Brian Zhu, Daniel Jin, Zheng Qi, Neeraj Parihar, Zhoutian Xu, Oliver Gao
